name: Spiral Turns (Spiral, Curl and Rope Spinning)
preceding_figure_names: Advanced Hip Twists, Aida, Basic Movements, Closed Hip Twist, Curl, Hockey Stick, Open Hip Twist, Progressive Walks Forward, Spiral, Spot or Switch Turn to L (Lady to R)
following_figure_names: Alemana, Hockey Stick, Sliding Doors, Fencing, Three Alemanas, Basic Movements, Open Hip Twist, Curl, Three Threes, New York LSP, Spot or Switch Turn to R (Lady to L), Underarm Turn to L, Reverse Top
notes: At "1", still need to settle into R hip. 2: LF fwd Fan finish. Settle hip. 3: RF fwd and slightly across, then turn to end RF back. RF forward, slightly cross feet, upper thighs tight, sharp left turn. Push LF after turn. 4 1: LF back in Fan Position. For Fan finish, L hip to side, (do not rotate L to open up), keep thighs very tightly closed. Then, at "&", rotate L hip to draw RF in sharply, then twist hip to R into next figure.

comments: Continue with steps 4-6 of Spiral. Finish in Fan.
Give it a moment to be "tall", stomach back, chest forward before settling. Then, really settle, R shoulder connect down to right hip, R arm stay rounded.
RF fwd, slightly cross to L, let upper body turn L first, keep R arm same level (do not drop) and rounded.
For Fan finish, L hip to side, (do not rotate L to open up), keep thighs very tightly closed. Then, at "&", rotate L hip to draw RF in sharply, then twist hip to R into next figure.
